dict.string: TheLight uses Calendar to let you add customer appointment events when you choose.
TheLight uses Calendar to create customer appointment events when you choose.
TheLight uses the camera to scan membership QR codes when you choose.
TheLight uses Contacts to let you add customer contact cards when you choose.
TheLight uses Face ID to unlock your existing signed-in session when you choose biometric sign-in.
TheLight uses your location to show maps, get weather, and share your current location when you choose.
TheLight saves generated QR codes to your photo library when you choose Save to Photos.
TheLight uses your photo library to let you select profile and chat images when you choose.
